nasb.text: Let them extol Him also in the congregation of the people, And praise Him at the seat of the elders.

esv.text: Let them extol him in the congregation of the people, and praise him in the assembly of the elders.

cnv.text: 願他們在眾民的會中尊崇他， 在長老的集會中讚美他。

ccb.text: 他们当在众人面前尊崇祂， 在众首领面前赞美祂。

csbs.text: 愿他们在子民的会众里尊崇他， 在长老们的座位上赞美他！
